results.planUi:
PLAN TO APPROVE

Target the selected button’s parent form and make the minimum accessibility corrections: add visible keyboard focus styles and return focus to the title field after validation errors. Existing labels, tab order, status notifications, and known button contrast already satisfy the review.

What will change

Add an action step
Disconnect action steps
Connect action steps

Where

Save button on Dashboard · revision 41

Your authorization

Nothing has changed yet. Approval allows only this listed plan on this revision.

Verification

7 planned checks, plus Kyro runtime verification.

Using only Tab and Shift+Tab, focus moves in DOM order: Task title, Due date, Create Task; no positive tabindex or reordering is introduced.
Each interactive form component has a clearly visible focus outline with sufficient contrast against its adjacent background.
Submitting an empty, shorter-than-3-character, or longer-than-80-character title returns keyboard focus to Task title and announces the existing error status.
Submitting a valid title from the keyboard creates the task and announces “Task created successfully.”
Accessible names remain “Create a task”, “Task title”, “Due date”, and “Create Task”.
Known submit-button text/background combinations retain sufficient contrast on desktop, tablet, and mobile.
The complete invalid-to-correction-to-success workflow can be completed without a pointer.

0 visual changes proposed.

What will change
Impact

Global capability draft

Where

Your authorization

Verification

4 planned checks, plus Kyro runtime verification.

Global capability proposal: Task Summary PDF Export v1. Approving saves an inactive, versioned draft for every Kyro project; activation still requires its tests and review.

The action exports only the task currently displayed in Task detail card 22bf5cca-1aa3-475a-9d5e-6fea6b07fea5.
The downloaded file is a valid PDF with a deterministic, sanitized filename.
No selected task, rendering failure, blocked download, and invalid input each produce a typed error without an empty or corrupt file.
No package, service, or capability is installed or activated before explicit review.

  "summary": "Propose an inactive reusable capability for exporting the displayed task summary as a PDF; the indexed graph contains no registered PDF capability.",
  "skill": "kyro-live-context + kyro-actions",
  "requirements": [],

    "web"
  ],
  "operations": [],
  "checks": [
    "The action exports only the task currently displayed in Task detail card 22bf5cca-1aa3-475a-9d5e-6fea6b07fea5.",
    "The downloaded file is a valid PDF with a deterministic, sanitized filename.",
    "No selected task, rendering failure, blocked download, and invalid input each produce a typed error without an empty or corrupt file.",
    "No package, service, or capability is installed or activated before explicit review."

  "confirmations": [
    "Explicit approval is required before selecting or installing a PDF dependency.",

  ],
  "alreadySatisfied": false,
  "capabilityProposal": {
    "scope": "global",
    "kind": "plugin",
    "name": "Task Summary PDF Export v1",
    "generalizedIntent": "Generate a downloadable PDF from a typed summary record in any project. Return typed success metadata or typed errors for missing input, invalid input, rendering failure, and blocked download.",
    "inputs": [
      "summary: record containing the displayed entity fields",
      "documentTitle: string",
      "fileName: string"
    ],
    "outputs": [
      "success: boolean",
      "fileName: string",
      "mimeType: application/pdf",
      "errorCode: NO_RECORD | INVALID_INPUT | RENDER_FAILED | DOWNLOAD_BLOCKED",
      "errorMessage: string"
    ],
    "permissions": [
      "browser file download initiated by an explicit user action"
    ],
    "dependencies": [
      "One exact reviewed PDF-generation dependency with a pinned version; none selected or installed by this proposal"
    ],
    "validationTests": [
      "A valid summary produces a parseable application/pdf document.",
      "The PDF contains the supplied title and summary values.",
      "The filename is deterministic and strips unsafe characters.",
      "Missing summary returns NO_RECORD and creates no file.",
      "Invalid input returns INVALID_INPUT and creates no file.",
      "Renderer failure returns RENDER_FAILED and creates no corrupt file.",
      "A blocked browser download returns DOWNLOAD_BLOCKED.",
      "The capability remains inactive until dependency review and all tests pass."
    ],
    "activation": "explicit_review",
    "effects": [],
    "platforms": [
      "web"
    ]
  }
}
